testcase.name: test_super_admin_login_wrong_secret
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration6_features.py:61: in test_super_admin_login_wrong_secret assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_tenant_live_stats
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration6_features.py:176: in test_get_tenant_live_stats assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_toggle_tenant_status_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration6_features.py:376: in test_toggle_tenant_status_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
